| Friends,

Patrick is a CPA. He cares about the numbers. Right now, he is laser-focused on the fundraising number we have to post at the end of the quarter on September 30th.

As one of his strongest supporters, he asked me to make sure you were updated on the numbers, too. Here is where we stand before we jump into to our quarterly push:

Last quarter, with the help of supporters like you, we were able to raise $25,000 in the last 10 days of the quarter.

**If we add 250 new supporters to the campaign, we have the opportunity to grow our profit by $5,000.**

We're working to get 250 new Team Murphy members before the deadline. **Forward this email to three or four friends, and see if they 're interested in joining and [_supporting Patrick by signing here._](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20f9/738133e4/3afb0ccc/7f88318f/718005211/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e150905m")**

name: Jane O'Meara Sanders
subject: How I met Bernie
body:
#
Dear Friend,
I first met Bernie when he was running for mayor of Burlington. At the time, I was working at a youth center and had arranged a meeting between low-income citizens' groups and the incumbent mayor.
When I started asking questions about what our city was doing to help children and families, the mayor replied, "Now, you sound like Bernie Sanders."
Well, I had to meet this Bernie character.
So we organized a debate and that was when I heard Bernie speak for the first time. I fell in love with his ideas right then and there, and soon after, I fell in love with Bernie himself. It's been an amazing 35 years at each other's sides, building our family and working together for fairness and equity for working families.
Even though we're a long way from the Burlington mayor's race, I know that the passion with which Bernie approaches the issues that matter hasn't changed one bit. It's just that now he's running for president, and the whole country gets to participate in this political revolution.
Bernie's birthday is Tuesday, September 8th. We're asking his supporters to sign his birthday card and share birthday wishes with him.
[**Sign the card to wish Bernie a happy birthday.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2214/43f17890/5b1062d6/621cfc68/4232736560/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/happy-birthday-bernie?source=em150905jane-full")
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2214/43f17890/5b1062d6/621cfc68/4232736560/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/happy-birthday-bernie?source=em150905jane-full")
As Bernie and I travel the country, it's so inspiring to see the dedication and enthusiasm of the supporters of our campaign. I know he would love to hear from you on his birthday.
[**Click here to add your name to Bernie's birthday card.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2214/43f17890/5b1062d6/621cfc68/4232736560/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/happy-birthday-bernie?source=em150905jane-full")
Sincerely,
Jane O'Meara Sanders
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2214/43f17890/5b1062d6/621cfc69/4232736560/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em150905jane-full")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2214/43f17890/5b1062d6/621cfc17/4232736560/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2214/43f17890/5b1062d6/621cfc15/4232736560/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

_Sen. Ted Cruz brought an enthusiastic crowd of about 2,000 supporters to their feet at the Stockyards Thursday with his recitation of how he would set about undoing President Obama 's legacy, piece by piece, on a very busy first day in the White House. They never sat down. _
_..._
_Presenting his candidacy as a crusade to save America as "the last, best hope for mankind," Cruz closed his remarks with the declaration, "We are not prepared to go quietly into the night." _
_The crowd roared its approval and then many surged toward the candidate, surrounding him as, one by one, family unit by family unit, he shook hands, signed books and had photos taken._

clean_body: Courageous Conservatives - Reigniting the Promise of America Hello Friend, Only a couple short weeks after our in Des Moines, Iowa, events took place that show why this race is so important. On Thursday, for the first time ever, the government arrested a Christian woman, Kim Davis in Kentucky, for living according to her faith. As Ted said in response, "This is wrong. This is not America." Ted spoke out in reaction: I hope you'll and . Ted is calling upon every Believer, every Constitutionalist, every lover of liberty to stand with Kim Davis and for an end to the persecution of people of faith. . Also this week, Ted took the campaign back to his home state of Texas where the response was simply electric. Thousands of supporters turned out to support the campaign at stops in Fort Worth, Tyler, and Kingwood. I think this headline from the Austin American-Statesman put the reaction we saw from Texans best: . Sen. Ted Cruz brought an enthusiastic crowd of about 2,000 supporters to their feet at the Stockyards Thursday with his recitation of how he would set about undoing President Obama 's legacy, piece by piece, on a very busy first day in the White House. They never sat down. ... Presenting his candidacy as a crusade to save America as "the last, best hope for mankind," Cruz closed his remarks with the declaration, "We are not prepared to go quietly into the night." The crowd roared its approval and then many surged toward the candidate, surrounding him as, one by one, family unit by family unit, he shook hands, signed books and had photos taken. Whether it's in Texas, Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina, or anywhere else, we're seeing a tremendous response from courageous conservatives across the nation who want to reignite the promise of America -- and it's because of your hard work. So thank you again for everything you're doing to spread the word about this campaign -- our campaign \-- with your friends, family, and neighbors. Together, we're going to win!
